languages.text: "Что-то мешает лифту. Похоже, колючка наросла. Пальните в нее что ли, Ваша Светлость?"
"Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: "Что-то мешает лифту. Похоже, колючка наросла. Пальните в нее что ли, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: “有东西卡住了电梯。看样子是那些疯长的增生体。大人，可以麻烦您把它们轰掉吗？”
languages.original_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: “有东西卡住了电梯。看样子是那些疯长的增生体。大人，可以麻烦您把它们轰掉吗？”

languages.text: "Bir şey asansörü sıkıştırıyor. Şu aşırı büyüme galiba. Şuna bir ateş eder misiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Bir şey asansörü sıkıştırıyor. Şu aşırı büyüme galiba. Şuna bir ateş eder misiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: « Il y a quelque chose qui bloque l'ascenseur. On dirait que c'est cette énorme épine. Vous pouvez faire sauter tout ça, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: « Il y a quelque chose qui bloque l'ascenseur. On dirait que c'est cette énorme épine. Vous pouvez faire sauter tout ça, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: «Algo ha atascado el ascensor. Parece que es cosa de la planta. ¿Puede encargarse de ella, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».
languages.original_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: «Algo ha atascado el ascensor. Parece que es cosa de la planta. ¿Puede encargarse de ella, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

languages.text: "Etwas blockiert den Aufzug. Vermutlich dieses Unkraut. Macht es weg, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"
languages.original_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Etwas blockiert den Aufzug. Vermutlich dieses Unkraut. Macht es weg, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!"

languages.text: 「何かが昇降機を妨げています。どうやらあの繁茂した植物のようです。ひとつ撃ち払ってくださいませんか、{mf|閣下|閣下}？」
languages.original_text: "Something's jamming the lift. Looks like it's that overgrowth. Give it a blast, will you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: 「何かが昇降機を妨げています。どうやらあの繁茂した植物のようです。ひとつ撃ち払ってくださいませんか、{mf|閣下|閣下}？」
